title: Diploma Jobs 2026 – Assistant Veterinary Field Officer
shortInfo: Dantewada District Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class). Candidates with Diploma, 12th Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Dantewada District official website dantewada.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: Dantewada District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Dantewada District Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class). Candidates with Diploma, 12th Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Dantewada District official website dantewada.nic.in.

application_fee.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Dantewada District Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.details: 10+2 with Biology from a recognized university/institution. 2-year Diploma in Veterinary Polytechnic.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dantewada.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Dantewada District AVFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) posts is 18th June 2026.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the AVFO post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) position.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the AVFO post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 10+2 with Biology and a 2-year Diploma in Veterinary Polytechnic from a recognized institution.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the AVFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) posts is between 18 to 35 years as of 1st January 2026.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the AVFO position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 23,350.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Are there any application fees for the AVFO posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these posts.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the AVFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes evaluation of Educational Qualification, Skill Test, Experience, and Interview.

faq.question: Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Dantewada District.

faq.question: What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 285 / P.Ch. / DMF / 2026-27.

seo_tags: Dantewada District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) Recruitment 2026
